extract: Appletun (Japanese: タルップル Tarupple) is a dual-type Grass/Dragon Pokémon introduced in Generation VIII. It evolves from Applin when exposed to a Sweet Apple. It is one of Applin's three branched Evolutions, the others being Flapple and Dipplin (which evolves into Hydrapple). Appletun has a Gigantamax form which is identical in appearance to Gigantamax Flapple. It can Gigantamax into Gigantamax Appletun if it has the Gigantamax Factor.
